reviews.review_description: Great game but please start updating ur games more they are really cool but there very repetitive when there’s no updates

I got the game for free in the discord but overall fun  game it has blood and it's really fun u should add pepper spray and cars maybe and some more guns and suff but yes the game is alr it has some bugs but it's pretty fun 8.5/10 for me

It does absolutely nothing, loads you into a room where you can't do anything. You Can't select anything, there's  just a podium, some chairs and doors that go nowhere, doesn't tell you what to do. NOTHING! Waste of money

developer_response.body: Hey, you have to stand nearby the stand to receive the menu.

reviews.review_description: This game is very fun but It needs more stuff like more guns and scenarios and also attachments
